blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,007 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
